title: AMD and Anthropic plan a two-gigawatt expansion for Claude
friendlyTitle: AMD will provide much more computing power for Claude
summary: Anthropic plans to deploy up to two gigawatts of AMD Instinct MI450-series capacity, with the first gigawatt scheduled to begin in the first half of 2027. AMD also plans to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic, while the companies will use Claude to improve AMD workloads and ROCm software.
friendlySummary: Anthropic plans to use a very large amount of AMD hardware for Claude, and AMD may invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic.
whyItMatters: The agreement gives Anthropic another large source of compute and gives AMD a prominent customer beyond the NVIDIA ecosystem. More hardware competition could improve capacity and pricing over time, although the promised deployment and investment remain forward-looking.
friendlyWhyItMatters: More competition between AI chip suppliers may improve supply and prices, but most of this project will happen in the future.
